name: Event-Native Broker Simulation
description: Kafka-style broker simulation for telco event monetization, showing how partners subscribe to governed network, fraud and SLA event topics.
businessStory: A regional telco exposes not only REST APIs, but also monetizable real-time event streams. Banks, mobility partners and enterprise customers subscribe to governed event topics and are charged based on event delivery, topic subscription and SLA-critical alerts.
businessOutcome: Turns network events into a sellable product line with governance, throttling, observability, partner settlement and event-level metering.

topics.description: Quality-on-demand and network SLA events for enterprise and mobility partners.
SIM swap and high-risk identity events for banks, wallets and marketplaces.
Usage, charging and settlement events for partner revenue-share operations.
